notes: Recognizable as the same horizontal Loligo pose with mantle-left/arms-right orientation, but the splayed arm cluster and long whip tentacles from the photo are simplified into stubby, distorted appendages and stippling is scattered noise rather than chromatophore patches.
specific_issues: upper tentacle reads as broken/detached strokes rather than a continuous whip
arm count and splay don't match the photo's fanned-out arm crown
long tentacles lack the characteristic clubbed tips visible in the photo
stipple is uniform speckle noise instead of concentrated chromatophore fields
fin silhouette flattened on the left edge, losing the diamond-fin profile
small dark blobs along outline read as photo-trace artifacts rather than deliberate ink marks
eye rendered as tiny ring without the almond lid shape seen in FAO plates
